passive.name: Fleet of Foot
passive.description: Sivir gains a short burst of Move Speed when she attacks an enemy champion.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Sivir}} basic attacks and damaging abilities against enemy {{tip|champions}} briefly grant her a burst of {{sti|ms|{{as|move speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Sivir's''' [[basic attack]]s and [[Champion ability|ability]] hits against enemy {{tip|champions}} grant her {{sti|ms|{{as|{{pp|changedisplay=true|55 to 75 for 5|1;6;11;16;18}} '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} decaying over {{fd|1.5}} seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits.

Q.name: Boomerang Blade
Q.description: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing damage each way.
Q.tooltip: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing {{ totaldamage }} to all enemies it cuts through. Hitting non-champions reduces the damage to subsequent targets, down to a minimum of {{ falloffminimum*100 }}%.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sivir}} hurls her crossblade in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: At max range, it homes back to '''Sivir''' to deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sivir''' hurls her crossblade in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies within its path, increased by {{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|0 to 50 for 11|0 to 100|formula=0.5% per 1% critical strike chance|color=critical strike chance}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Boomerang Blade's'' damage is reduced by {{pp|key=%|changedisplay=true|type=non-champions hit|0 to 60 for 5|0 to 4|formula=100%-(15%*Nº of non-champions hit). ''This is capped at 40% damage at 4 enemies hit.''}}. Upon reaching maximum range, the crossblade returns to her, resetting the damage modifier and dealing the same damage to enemies on its way back.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Enemies can be hit only once per pass.''
wiki_detail.cast time: {{as|{{pp|type='''bonus''' attack speed|round=3|0.25;0.231;0.198;0.165;0.132;0.1|key1=%|0;15.2;41.6;68;94.4;120|formula=0.25*(1-(0.5 per 100% '''bonus''' attack speed)). ''This is capped at 60% reduction at 120% '''bonus''' attack speed.''}}|attack speed}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Due to the cast time effectively rounding up to full game ticks, at undesturbed game tick interval times the technical minimum cast time is {{rutngt|0.1875}} reached at {{as|{{fd|99.8}}% '''bonus''' attack speed}}.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* If '''Sivir''' enters {{ii|Zhonya's Hourglass|stasis}} during ''Boomerang Blade's'' initial flight, it will not return to her.
** This will also prevent it from dealing damage a second time.
* The damage reduction per unit hit resets back to full damage upon changing direction.
* ''Boomerang Blade'' will still return to '''Sivir''' even if she dies before it changes direction.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} only blocks one instance of damage.

W.name: Ricochet
W.description: Sivir's next few basic attacks gain additional attack speed and bounce to nearby targets, dealing reduced damage while bouncing.
W.tooltip:
For the next {{ buffduration }} seconds, Sivir gains {{ ricochetattackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed and her auto attacks are empowered to bounce to additional surrounding enemies dealing {{ bouncedamage }} physical damage each bounce for up to {{ maxbounces }} bounces.

These bounces critically strike if the attack generating them does.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Sivir}} gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds. During this time, her basic attacks create projectiles that repeatedly bounce to nearby surrounding enemies, dealing {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sivir''' empowers her crossblade for the next 4 seconds, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and causing her basic attacks to bounce to additional surrounding enemies, dealing them {{as|physical damage}}. If the triggering attack {{tip|critical strike|critically strikes}}, the bounces will do so as well. ''Ricochet'' deals 65% damage against {{tip|minions}} and executes them if they would be left below {{sti|{{as|15 health}}}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Bounces occur only up to 8 times and can target each enemy up to one additional time per empowered attack. They prioritize the nearest new target, then the nearest target if no new targets are available.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Ricochet {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Sivir's''' basic attack timer. The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be bounced to.''
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|1750|Attack missile speed, same as basic attack}} / {{tt|1000|Bounced missile speed}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Ricochet''-enhanced basic attacks can bounce from structures onto secondary targets but not from nearby units onto structures.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Ricochet's '' interactions with {{tip|dodge|dodging}}, {{tip|block|blocking}}, and {{tip|blind|blinding}} effects.
* ''Ricochet'' do not apply to additional targets with {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}.

E.name: Spell Shield
E.description: Creates a magical barrier that blocks a single enemy ability cast on Sivir. She receives health and a burst of movement speed if a spell is blocked.
E.tooltip: Sivir creates a magical barrier for {{ e1 }} seconds that blocks the next incoming enemy Ability. If an ability is blocked, Sivir restores {{ totalheal }} health and triggers Fleet of Foot.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Sivir''' {{tip|heals}} herself and activates {{ai|Fleet of Foot|Sivir}} if it blocks an ability.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sivir''' gains a {{tip|spell shield}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. Upon successfully blocking a hostile effect, she {{tip|heals}} herself and activates ''{{ai|Fleet of Foot|Sivir}}'' after {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Spell Shield'' will heal and activate {{ai|Fleet of Foot|Sivir}} if any effect is blocked. This includes effects such as [[champion ability|champion abilities]], [[Named item effect|item effects]], {{uis|Dragon}} basic attacks, as well as the abilities of {{ui|Baron Nashor}} and {{ui|Rift Herald}}.
* ''Spell Shield'' will still block abilities that have already been applied to '''Sivir''' if the delayed effects of that ability is [[area of effect]] (e.g. {{ai|Blaze 2|Brand|Blaze's}} explosion, {{ai|Chum the Waters|Fizz}}, and {{ai|Time Bomb|Zilean}}).

R.name: On The Hunt
R.description: Sivir leads her allies in battle, granting them a surge of Move Speed for a period of time. In addition, Sivir's attacks reduce her spell cooldowns.
